case_title: DAVID LEWIS ROBINSON VS. JOHN EDMUND JONES, ESQ.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. THE COURT ACCEPTS PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON AUGUST 10, 2009. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOHN EDMUND JONES, ESQ. ON NOV-09-2009 - DENIED. DEFENDANT MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED WITH PREJUDICE DUE TO FAILURE OF DEFENDANT TO APPEAR. MOTION OF PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR BY PHONE WAS GRANTED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ROBINSON, DAVID LEWIS AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ESQ., JOHN EDMUND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOHN EDMUND JONES, ESQ. SET FOR OCT-16-2009 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-09-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN 506.
